creator: rich@FreeBSD.org.uk
text:
When removing nocol-4.3 installed from ports, several files are missing from
the plist, one is listed but not installed, and one is incorrectly listed.

Fix: Apply the patch below to ports/net/nocol/pkg-plist

How-To-Repeat: 
Install nocol from ports/net/nocol and then remove using pkg_delete (and
probably all other methods).
